name: effective_date
label: Effective Date
hint: Select effective date of agreement

name: execution_place
label: Execution Place
hint: Enter city and state where agreement is executed

name: party_a_name
label: Party A Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: party_a_address
label: Party A Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: party_a_type
label: Party A Type
hint: Select type of Party A

name: party_a_authorized_signatory_name
label: Party A Authorized Signatory Name
hint: Enter the name of the person signing on behalf of Party A

name: party_a_authorized_signatory_designation
label: Party A Authorized Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation of Party A's signatory

name: party_b_name
label: Party B Name
hint: Enter full legal name

name: party_b_address
label: Party B Address
hint: Enter complete address

name: party_b_type
label: Party B Type
hint: Select type of Party B

name: party_b_authorized_signatory_name
label: Party B Authorized Signatory Name
hint: Enter the name of the person signing on behalf of Party B

name: party_b_authorized_signatory_designation
label: Party B Authorized Signatory Designation
hint: Enter designation of Party B's signatory

name: jv_type_structural
label: Joint Venture Type (Structural)
hint: Select whether the JV operates as a separate incorporated entity

name: venture_name
label: Joint Venture Name
hint: Enter name of joint venture entity

name: venture_objective
label: Venture Objective
hint: Describe purpose and scope of the joint venture

name: business_activities
label: Business Activities
hint: Specify activities to be carried out

name: contribution_details
label: Contribution Details
hint: Specify capital, assets, services contributed by each party

name: representations_and_warranties
label: Representations & Warranties
hint: Record each party's promises regarding title, authority, and ownership of contributed assets

name: ownership_percentage
label: Ownership Percentage
hint: Enter ownership share of each party, e.g. Party A 60%, Party B 40%

name: share_capital_details
label: Share Capital
hint: Specify authorized, issued, and subscribed share capital of the JV

name: par_value_per_share
label: Par Value Per Share
hint: Enter par or face value per share, if applicable

name: profit_sharing_ratio
label: Profit Sharing Ratio
hint: Enter agreed profit sharing ratio

name: loss_sharing_ratio
label: Loss Sharing Ratio
hint: Enter loss sharing ratio

name: funding_triggers
label: Funding Triggers (Capital Calls)
hint: Describe how additional funding is requested if the initial contribution becomes insufficient

name: management_model
label: Management Model
hint: Select the broad management structure

name: management_structure
label: Management Structure Details
hint: Define roles, responsibilities, and decision-making authority

name: board_composition
label: Board / Committee Composition
hint: Specify board members, committees, and representation

name: board_nomination_rights
label: Board Nomination Rights
hint: State who can nominate directors or committee members once ownership thresholds are met

name: decision_making_process
label: Decision Making Process
hint: Explain voting rights and approval requirements

name: deadlock_resolution
label: Deadlock Resolution
hint: Choose how deadlocks are handled

name: casting_vote_holder
label: Casting Vote Holder
hint: State who holds the tie-breaking vote in case of a deadlock

name: deadlock_resolution_details
label: Deadlock Resolution Details
hint: Add procedural details for the chosen deadlock resolution mechanism
show_if: deadlock_resolution == 'Third-Party Mediator' || deadlock_resolution == 'Shotgun / Russian Roulette' || deadlock_resolution == 'Custom'

name: bank_account_details
label: Banking & Finance
hint: Specify bank account operation and financial control

name: dividend_policy
label: Dividend Policy
hint: Specify how much profit is retained in the business and how much is distributed

name: term_duration
label: Term / Duration
hint: Enter duration of joint venture

name: confidentiality_clause
label: Confidentiality Clause
hint: Specify confidentiality obligations

name: non_compete_clause
label: Non-Compete Clause
hint: Restrictions on competing businesses

name: non_solicitation_period
label: Non-Solicitation Period
hint: If non-compete obligations apply, state the employee/client non-solicitation period

name: intellectual_property_rights
label: Intellectual Property Rights
hint: Define ownership of IP created

name: transfer_restrictions_applicable
label: Transfer Restrictions Apply
hint: Enable if a party must first offer its stake to the other party before selling externally

name: transfer_restrictions_details
label: Transfer Restrictions (Right of First Refusal)
hint: Describe ROFR, lock-in, tag-along, drag-along, or consent requirements

name: dispute_resolution
label: Dispute Resolution
hint: Specify mediation/arbitration process

name: termination_clause
label: Termination Clause
hint: Conditions for termination

name: exit_clause
label: Exit / Buyout Clause
hint: Define exit terms and buyout mechanism

name: buyout_valuation_method
label: Buyout Valuation Method
hint: Choose how the exit or buyout price will be calculated

name: force_majeure
label: Force Majeure Clause
hint: Events beyond control affecting agreement

name: governing_law
label: Governing Law
hint: Enter applicable law (e.g., Laws of India)

name: jurisdiction
label: Jurisdiction
hint: Enter court jurisdiction
